final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial fashion photograph for a luxury womenswear brand campaign.

Style/medium: high-contrast black-and-white fashion photography in the spirit of Helmut Newton, professional commercial grade, sharp and crisp
Composition: medium shot, model positioned at 45-degree angle to camera, head slightly tilted upward, elegant upright posture
Subject: female model wearing a pure white structural gown with architectural silhouette, exaggerated three-dimensional shoulder construction, cinched waist, A-line skirt flare
Scene/backdrop: seamless white cyclorama backdrop, minimalist studio environment
Lighting/mood: butterfly lighting setup, key light from 45 degrees above center, strong contrast between highlights and shadows to emphasize garment structure, confident and commanding mood
Color palette: achromatic black-white-gray base, deep crimson red accent on lips only
Materials/textures: crisp architectural fabric with structural drape, smooth seamless paper backdrop
Avoid: soft lighting, pastel colors, cluttered backgrounds, smiling expression, 8K stuffer aesthetic
